# OpenClaw生态里四类不同的浏览器相关技能

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzY5ODE1MTExMA==&mid=224748...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzY5ODE1MTExMA==&mid=2247484686&idx=1&sn=3a0fc01b7e0c212fc5caf69f31af92cf&chksm=f453fca7c32475b1aac9172d8136e6ca92d566216ad7cdd6fed56d85663b4072e55fc3406474&exptype=servicebox_1779201027597551&subscene=0&scene=288&clicktime=1779207619&enterid=1779207619&flutter_pos=4&biz_enter_id=5&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=1800492d&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=Y3ocGEEl5YjF3FNtFZDLfVya2bMpV68S/sCknvPxtI0tcZNOq6Mqahh2QKTNeJ5B&wx_header=3)

![](attachments/d0596c11f57eb66e.png)![](attachments/7074cb47fed85566.png)![](attachments/61a912eea55a2897.png)![](attachments/29b79fb8a968f072.png)![](attachments/d305714b103c13e4.png)![](attachments/4640ba6712e9f722.png)![](attachments/fbc347a0f2b2eb41.png)![](attachments/c540b5e3506f2464.png)![](attachments/26783b5359c685d6.png)

OpenClaw四类完全不同的浏览器相关技能，它们定位不同、能力互补。

这四者不是"选一个最好的"，而是"在不同场景用不同的工具"。它们的关系更像是：

搜索引擎（找网址）→ 基础浏览器（打开网址做简单操作）→ 专业浏览器（做复杂操作）→ 云端浏览器（解决环境问题）

#skills#openclaw#agent

Close
